app.name: Taster
a11y.themeToggle: Switch between light and dark themes
search.placeholder: Search a title or a tag…
sort.label: Sort by
sort.title: Title
view.label: View
list.empty.title: Nothing to show yet
list.empty.noData: The list is empty. Sign in to the admin to add your first taste.
stats.title: Statistics
error.network: The server is not responding. Try again in a moment.
login.title: Admin
login.error.locked: Too many failed attempts from your connection. Try again in 15 minutes.
login.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute.
password.title: New password required
password.intro: To secure your instance, choose a new password before continuing.
password.error.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: The password is too short (12 characters minimum).
password.error.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: The password is too predictable (make it longer or more varied).
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPER: Add at least one uppercase letter.
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWER: Add at least one lowercase letter.
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_SPECIAL: Add at least one special character.
password.error.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_USERNAM: The password must not contain the username.
admin.title: Admin
admin.empty: No tastes yet. Create the first one.
admin.bulk.deleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} taste(s)? This cannot be undone.
form.title: Title
form.noCategories: Create a category in the Categories tab first, then you can add a taste.
form.tags.placeholder: Add a tag and press Enter
form.tags.hint: Press Enter to confirm. Separate with commas to add several tags at once.
form.date.hint: Year only, year and month, or a full date, matching for instance a movie's release or the day you visited a restaurant.
form.date.invalid: Invalid date. Check the day, month and year.
form.image.hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or GIF, up to 5 MB: pick a file, drag and drop, or paste. The image is recompressed automatically. Click the preview to choose the point thumbnails keep centered.
form.image.error: Invalid image or file over 5 MB.
form.location.hint: The coordinates of a restaurant's address, for example. Leave empty if not relevant.
form.location.invalid: Latitude must be between -90 and 90 and longitude between -180 and 180. Fill both fields or neither.
form.section.subtitle: Subtitle
form.section.text: Text (Markdown supported, ||spoiler|| to hide a passage)
form.links.label: Label
form.links.hint: Links to learn more (Wikipedia, IMDb, Steam, official site…).
form.published.hint: Uncheck to keep this entry as a draft, invisible to visitors.
form.leave.confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page?
form.error.INVALID_URL: One of the URLs is invalid.
form.error.generic: Could not save. Check the form fields.
categories.name: Name
categories.icon.custom: Name of any other Heroicons icon…
categories.statuses.hint: The statuses offered for tastes in this category, in order.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete the category "{{name}}"? Its statuses go with it.
categories.error.inUse: Cannot delete: some tastes still use this category.
io.tastes.hint: A tastes file may contain one or several entries, with their image encoded in base64 if needed; a known id updates the existing entry.
io.import.preview: Import preview: {{imported}} to create, {{updated}} to update, {{errors}} error(s). Run the import?
io.import.invalidFile: This file is not a valid export.
io.export.withImages: Include images (the file will be larger)
io.categories.hint: Categories and their statuses travel in a separate file, so you can for instance install French categories on a fresh instance. An existing category gets updated.
